html:
“It's dubiously photosynthetical.”

–Wilson

“Looks burnable!”

–Willow

“Hello, upside-down tree.”

–Wolfgang

“Poor plant, locked away from the sun.”

–Wendy

“LIFE FINDS A WAY, UNFORTUNATELY”

–WX-78

“The seeds must have fallen down a sinkhole.”

–Wickerbottom

“They don't have those back home.”

–Woodie

“It looks like a banana, but I'm not buying it.”

–Maxwell

“Astonishing! Truly fascinating!”

–Wagstaff

“A flimsy mönkey tree.”

–Wigfrid

“It's a tropical cave tree, of course.”

–Webber

“That's not a real banana!”

–Walani

“There must be monkeys close by.”

–Warly

“'Nanas!”

–Wilbur

“Now ol'Woodlegs has seen it all.”

–Woodlegs

“IT GIVETH WILBA BANANAS!”

–Wilba

“Friend with Sweet Hair”

–Wormwood

“Aw, that's sweet. It grew those bananas just for me.”

–Wheeler

“That's, uh, a banana tree.”

–Winona

“What do I see? An underground tree!”

–Wortox

“See fruits up there!”

–Wurt

“I didn't know bananas could grow in caves.”

–Walter

“You can barely call it a tree.”

–Wanda

A Cave Banana Tree is a fruit-bearing plant which only grows in the Ruins and Caves, commonly in the Village Biome and occasionally in a Sunken Forest. It provides a Cave Banana when picked and regrows the fruit in four days.

Cave Banana Trees can be chopped down with an Axe to yield two Twigs and one Log. Chopping leaves a stump, which can be dug with a Shovel for an additional Log. Setting the tree on fire, then chopping it once burned will produce one Charcoal, whether or not the Cave Banana was still on the tree when burned. Chopped or burned Cave Banana Trees do not respawn, making them a nonrenewable resource.

Splumonkeys will pick the fruit on Cave Banana Trees on sight. This will not affect the regrowth rate of four days.

Trivia

  • The Cave Banana Tree is one of the few objects in the game with examination quotes for Wilbur.

Gallery

  • Harvested Cave Banana Tree.
  • Burnt Cave Banana Tree.
  • Cave Banana Trees in a Sunken Forest on a Map.


DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cây Chuối Hang là một loại cây ăn trái chỉ mọc ở Tàn tích và Hang động, thường ở Quần xã Làng và đôi khi ở Rừng Đắm. Nó cung cấp một quả Chuối Hang khi hái và mọc lại quả sau bốn ngày.

A '''Cave Banana Tree''' is a [[fruit]]-bearing [[Plants|plant]] which only grows in the [[Ruins]] and [[Caves]], commonly in the [[Village]] [[Biome]] and occasionally in a [[Sunken Forest]]. It provides a [[Cave Banana]] when picked and regrows the fruit in four [[day]]s.

Cave Banana Trees can be chopped down with an [[Axe]] to yield two [[Twigs]] and one [[Logs|Log]]. Chopping leaves a stump, which can be dug with a [[Shovel]] for an additional Log. Setting the tree on [[fire]], then chopping it once burned will produce one [[Charcoal]], whether or not the Cave Banana was still on the tree when burned. Chopped or burned Cave Banana Trees do not respawn, making them a nonrenewable resource.

[[Splumonkey]]s will pick the fruit on Cave Banana Trees on sight. This will not affect the regrowth rate of four days.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Cave Banana Tree is one of the few objects in the game with examination quotes for [[Wilbur]].
